title: micranthemum multiflorum
intro: Micranthemum multiflorum, also known as the creeping ledges plant, is a low-growing, spreading evergreen perennial native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Micranthemum multiflorum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and aid in wound healing. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
